hero.title: Fast, secure, one-tap access to a better internet.
hero.description: Enterprise-grade encryption, global high-speed servers, and ultimate online freedom—all at the tap of a button.

download.title: Ready to speed up your journey?
download.description: Download the app for free. New users get a free trial after sign-up.

items.title: Smart Quick Connect
items.description: Just tap "Quick Connect". Our smart algorithm selects the fastest server by distance, load, and latency.
items.advantage: Benefit: No configuration needed, one tap for optimal speed.

items.title: Bank-Level Encryption
items.description: AES-256 encryption keeps your data safe on any network. Ideal for public Wi-Fi, online banking, and private browsing.
items.advantage: Benefit: Hackers and ISPs cannot see your data.

items.title: 10,000+ Global Servers
items.description: Access 10,000+ servers in 59 countries. More servers mean lower load and more stable connections.
items.advantage: Benefit: Stream, game, and download without buffering.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.description: Why gamers and streamers choose us

items.label: Game DDoS Protection
items.description: Protect your games from DDoS attacks for smooth gameplay.

items.label: Network Kill Switch
items.description: Automatically cut network when VPN disconnects. Zero data leaks.

items.label: Multi-Device
items.description: One account works on multiple devices at the same time.

items.label: 24/7 Live Support
items.description: Get expert help anytime via chat or email.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.description: All plans include unlimited access to every feature.

seo.title: ABC - Your Smooth Smart Network Partner
seo.ogTitle: ABC - Dedicated IP, Control Your Network Identity
seo.description: ABC is a smooth, smart network partner that quietly filters congestion and lag, removing wait and distraction.
seo.keywords: ABC, smart network, dedicated IP, network acceleration, optimization, stable connection
